name: Aim Trainer Bee Pro
short_description: Click bees. Click fast. Score big and flex on the leaderboards.Track your accuracy, combos, and click speed with detailed stats. Improve every run, climb the charts, and prove you’ve got the best aim in the world.
detailed_description:
🐝-come a Pro!
A tiny, high-speed clicker built to sharpen your hand-eye coordination.

🏆 Compete with players around the world!
Yes, you heard that right! Your score is automatically ranked on the global leaderboard for everyone to see.

🕒 1-minute rounds — it’s easy to start, hard to stop!

How to Play:
🐝 Smaller bees = bigger points
⏱ The faster you click, the higher the score
🌻 Every 3 bees = Sunflower spawn
🐞 Kill the black beetle before it steals your score!

📊 Analyze your performance
Review your past games and spot your peak moments!
Use detailed graphs to track progress and see how your skills improve over time.

🐝 Made for everyone!
Whether you’re here to train your aim or just want a quick, satisfying challenge, Bee Pro is simple, addictive, and perfect for all ages.
